scientific_hypothesis: Spatially aligned PWV state improves 0-2 h heavy-rain occurrence skill only where the frozen radar forecast indicates dynamically plausible support; temporal tendency is a secondary incremental ablation.

target.reason_30_is_not_primary: Stage-0 audit found only 8 positive train events at 30 mm/h over 0-2 h.

stage0.pairing: strict; zero missing pairs in train/val/test
stage0.main_finding: Absolute PWV level is positively associated with future heavy-rain support; short observed PWV slope is negatively associated in train and validation.
stage0.unavailable_control: GNSS station-distance/coverage mask is unavailable because only gridded PWV PNGs are present.

model.name: PWVSignedCalibratorNowcastNet
model.interaction: candidate support AND learned radar gate AND signed real-minus-null PWV condition
model.identity_constraint: all-zero PWV produces exactly zero contribution and tensor-level radar identity

train_time_variants: spatial_control: same head trained and evaluated with fixed half-domain PWV displacement
tendency_real: static features plus observed first-to-last tendency

development_budget.checkpoint_selection: validation threshold-balanced loss plus preservation/FAR terms

promotion_gate.one_seed_role: point-estimate pass promotes only to replication
promotion_gate.replication_requirement: three seeds plus positive lower bound of paired day-cluster bootstrap CSI delta
promotion_gate.tendency_requirement: must improve over static_real; otherwise it remains a negative ablation

full_data_gate: Do not run a locked-test/full-data paper experiment until the one-seed pilot and three-seed replication both pass.
